title: tenoria protracta
intro: Tenoria protracta, also known as Mexican honeysuckle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Polemoniaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tenoria protracta include relief from fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Tenoria protracta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
